title: FastFood Delight Unofficial
description: An unofficial 1.20.1+ Forge/NeoForge port of akaneo2's FastFood Delight, which brings some fast food stuff to Minecraft!
body:
The mod is an unofficial port of akaneo2's [FastFood Delight](https://github.com/akaneoMT/FastFoodDelight) for Minecraft 1.20.1, adding some fast food stuff to the game.
![ItemGroup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41ee4b72bc4f8caa17f7e136b6c4af958ace1427.png)
Compared to the original version, this unofficial port has the following differences:

Cheese has been retained but modified to require the Cooking Pot, so you can get your iron bucket returned;
- A configuration file has been added for the fast food shop structure in villages;
- A crafting recipe has been added for the Checkout Machine.
- Make Checkout Machine mineable again.

Planning:

- Add recipes for drinks.
